problem_structure.unknown: which jar contains the key that opens the sealed exit
data: six glass jars filled with different coloured liquids
a chalkboard reading 'One jar contains the key. The rest will dissolve your gloves.'
problem_structure.condition: only one jar contains a key; the liquids in the other jars dissolve gloves

correct_approach: Stop at the entrance and name aloud what is wanted, what is given, and what binds them before touching anything; the key is literally contained inside one jar, not a property of the liquid.
